channel.title: Infrastructure on wcloud-lab
channel.description: Recent content in Infrastructure on wcloud-lab

item.title: Hardware
item.description: Three nodes, two architectures, one 200 Gbps cable.

item.title: Architecture
item.description: How the cluster is organized — FluxCD dependency chains, traffic flow, and component relationships.

item.title: Networking
item.description: Cilium, MetalLB, Gateway API, Tailscale, and a 200 Gbps RDMA interconnect.

item.title: Storage
item.description: Longhorn v1 data engine for distributed block storage.

item.title: GitOps
item.description: FluxCD-driven reconciliation — if it’s not in Git, it doesn’t exist.

item.title: GPU & AI
item.description: NVIDIA DGX Spark GPU stack, SR-IOV RDMA, and multi-node training with NCCL.

item.title: Stack Reference
item.description: Every component running in the cluster, at a glance.
